mapper.sql: record_id, student_id, teaching_id, action_type, resource_id, create_time
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into biz_learning_record(student_id, teaching_id, action_type, resource_id, create_time) values (#{studentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{teachingId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{actionType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{resourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into biz_learning_record
student_id,
teaching_id,
action_type,
resource_id,
create_time,
#{studentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{teachingId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{actionType,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{resourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update biz_learning_record
student_id = #{studentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
teaching_id = #{teachingId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
action_type = #{actionType,jdbcType=CHAR},
resource_id = #{resourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where record_id = #{recordId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update biz_learning_record set student_id = #{studentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, teaching_id = #{teachingId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, action_type = #{actionType,jdbcType=CHAR}, resource_id = #{resourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where record_id = #{recordId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
